시편 52:1.content: Why do you boast of mischief, mighty man? God’s loving kindness endures continually.

시편 52:2.content: Your tongue plots destruction, like a sharp razor, working deceitfully.

시편 52:3.content: You love evil more than good, lying rather than speaking the truth.

시편 52:4.content: You love all devouring words, you deceitful tongue.

시편 52:5.content: God will likewise destroy you forever. He will take you up, and pluck you out of your tent, and root you out of the land of the living.

시편 52:6.content: The righteous also will see it, and fear, and laugh at him, saying,

시편 52:7.content: “Behold, this is the man who didn’t make God his strength, but trusted in the abundance of his riches, and strengthened himself in his wickedness.”

시편 52:8.content: But as for me, I am like a green olive tree in God’s house. I trust in God’s loving kindness forever and ever.

시편 52:9.content: I will give you thanks forever, because you have done it. I will hope in your name, for it is good, in the presence of your saints.
